SEARCH
Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class Ghostturn

java.lang.Object
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
public class Ghostturn extends Object
Represents a wave of ghosts during a level

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    circles
    The number of circles this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)
    private int
    difficulty
    The difficulty of this wave (determines score additions)
    private boolean
    fish
    Boolean that states whether the characters in this wave are fish
    private ArrayList<Ghost>
    ghostspresent
    Array of the ghosts in this wave
    private ArrayList<Float>
    ghostx
    Array of the x positions of the ghosts in this wave
    private ArrayList<Float>
    ghosty
    Array of the y positions of the ghosts in this wave
    private int
    horizontalLines
    The number of horizontal lines this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)
    private int
    normalVs
    The number of normal V's this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)
    private int
    numAlive
    The number of ghosts that haven't been killed in this wave
    private int
    numGhosts
    The number of ghosts in this wave
    private float
    speedModifier
    Speed modifier for the ghosts
    private final int
    totshapes
    Constant value of the number of possible shapes
    private int
    upsideDownVs
    The number of upside down V's this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)
    private int
    verticalLines
    The number of vertical lines this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)

    Constructs a ghostTurn object

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    decrementNumAlive()
    Decrements the count of living ghosts in this wave by one.
    int
    getCircles()
    Returns the number of circles that are still available to be drawn
    ArrayList<Ghost>
    getGhostspresent()
    Returns the list of ghosts currently present in this wave.
    ArrayList<Float>

    Returns the list of x positions for the ghosts in this wave.

    getGhosty()
    Returns the list of y positions for the ghosts in this wave.
    int
    getHorizontalLines()
    Returns the number of horizontalLines that are still available to be drawn
    int
    getNormalVs()
    Returns the number of normalVs that are still available to be drawn
    int
    getNumAlive()
    Returns the number of ghosts that are still alive in this wave.
    int
    getNumGhosts()
    Returns the total number of ghosts originally in this wave.
    float
    getSpeedModifier()
    Returns the speed modifier for the ghosts in this wave.
    int
    getUpsideDownVs()
    Returns the number of upsideDownVs that are still available to be drawn
    int
    getVerticalLines()
    Returns the number of verticalLines that are still available to be drawn
    boolean
    hasAliveGhosts()
    Checks whether any ghost in this turn is still alive.
    boolean
    hasDyingGhosts()
    Checks whether any ghost in this turn is still showing its death animation.
    boolean
    isAlive()
    checks if the ghostTurn is alive
    boolean
    isCompletelyFinished()
    Checks whether this turn is fully finished, including any death animations.
    boolean
    shapeDrawn(int shapeIndex, Cat c)
    Removes the shape corresponding to shapeIndex from the end of the ghosts Increments the scores if needed Adds a shield to the cat if needed Removes ghosts if needed Also updates the five shape fields based on the shape removed
    void
    speedModifier()
    Modifies the speed by a factor based on the number of shapes and number of ghosts
    void
    updateCounts()
    Initializes the circle, horizontalLines, normalVs, etc.

  • Constructor Details

    • Ghostturn

      public Ghostturn(int nGhosts, int len, int diff)
      Constructs a ghostTurn object
      Parameters:
      nGhosts - the number of ghosts in this wave
      len - the number of shapes for each ghost
      diff - the difficulty of this wave

    • Ghostturn

      public Ghostturn(int diff, int[] counts)
      Constructs a ghostTurn object
      Parameters:
      diff - the difficulty of the wave
      counts - An array of the number of shapes in each ghost of the wave

    • Ghostturn

      public Ghostturn(int diff, int[] counts, boolean[] fulks)
      constructs a ghostTurn object
      Parameters:
      diff - the difficulty of this wave of ghosts
      counts - An array of the number of shapes in each ghost of the wave
      fulks - An array of booleans that represents the ghosts in the wave that are Mr. Fulk

    • Ghostturn

      public Ghostturn(int nGhosts, int len, int diff, boolean allFish, boolean circle, boolean all)
      constructs a ghostTurn object
      Parameters:
      nGhosts - the number of ghosts in this wave
      len - the number of shapes for each ghost
      diff - the difficulty of this wave
      allFish - whether this wave has only fish
      circle - whether this wave has a shield
      all - whether this wave has only Mr. s

    • Ghostturn

      public Ghostturn(Ghost g)
      constructs a ghostTurn object with one ghost
      Parameters:
      g - the single ghost in this wave

  • Method Details

    • updateCounts

      public void updateCounts()
      Initializes the circle, horizontalLines, normalVs, etc. parameters to their initial values. Method is used in Level class

    • shapeDrawn

      public boolean shapeDrawn(int shapeIndex, Cat c)
      Removes the shape corresponding to shapeIndex from the end of the ghosts Increments the scores if needed Adds a shield to the cat if needed Removes ghosts if needed Also updates the five shape fields based on the shape removed
      Parameters:
      shapeIndex - the Index of the shape drawn
      c - the Cat object in the game (contains lives)
      Returns:
      true if at least one ghost died.

    • speedModifier

      public void speedModifier()
      Modifies the speed by a factor based on the number of shapes and number of ghosts

    • hasAliveGhosts

      public boolean hasAliveGhosts()
      Checks whether any ghost in this turn is still alive.
      Returns:
      true if at least one ghost is alive

    • hasDyingGhosts

      public boolean hasDyingGhosts()
      Checks whether any ghost in this turn is still showing its death animation.
      Returns:
      true if at least one ghost is still dying

    • isCompletelyFinished

      public boolean isCompletelyFinished()
      Checks whether this turn is fully finished, including any death animations.
      Returns:
      true if no ghosts are alive and no death animations remain

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      checks if the ghostTurn is alive
      Returns:
      whether the ghostTurn is completed

    • getCircles

      public int getCircles()
      Returns the number of circles that are still available to be drawn
      Returns:
      the number of circles

    • getHorizontalLines

      public int getHorizontalLines()
      Returns the number of horizontalLines that are still available to be drawn
      Returns:
      the number of horizontalLines

    • getVerticalLines

      public int getVerticalLines()
      Returns the number of verticalLines that are still available to be drawn
      Returns:
      the number of verticalLines

    • getNormalVs

      public int getNormalVs()
      Returns the number of normalVs that are still available to be drawn
      Returns:
      the number of normalVs

    • getUpsideDownVs

      public int getUpsideDownVs()
      Returns the number of upsideDownVs that are still available to be drawn
      Returns:
      the number of upsideDownVs

    • getNumGhosts

      public int getNumGhosts()
      Returns the total number of ghosts originally in this wave.
      Returns:
      the number of ghosts

    • getNumAlive

      public int getNumAlive()
      Returns the number of ghosts that are still alive in this wave.
      Returns:
      the number of living ghosts

    • decrementNumAlive

      public void decrementNumAlive()
      Decrements the count of living ghosts in this wave by one. This can be used when a ghost is explicitly defeated or removed.

    • getGhostspresent

      public ArrayList<Ghost> getGhostspresent()
      Returns the list of ghosts currently present in this wave.
      Returns:
      the array list of ghost objects

    • getGhostx

      public ArrayList<Float> getGhostx()
      Returns the list of x positions for the ghosts in this wave.
      Returns:
      the array list of x positions

    • getGhosty

      public ArrayList<Float> getGhosty()
      Returns the list of y positions for the ghosts in this wave.
      Returns:
      the array list of y positions

    • getSpeedModifier

      public float getSpeedModifier()
      Returns the speed modifier for the ghosts in this wave.
      Returns:
      the speed modifier factor
